name: dom-manipulation-modal-assignment-asuarez18
description: - The DOM is a programming interface for HTML and XML documents. - It represents the page so that programs can change the document structure, style, and content. - The DOM represents the document as nodes and objects. That way, programming languages can connect to the page. - The DOM is an object-oriented representation of the web page, which can be modified with a scripting language such as JavaScript. - It has properties and methods for accessing and interacting with all the elements of an HTML document.
